title: Chapter 100
content:
Chapter 100

“Aaahhhh!!!”

“…” "For the umpteenth time, can you scream a little lower?" I said calmly after letting him scream for a good minute. "I can almost hear my ears ringing.”

I kept complaining, but the other person didn't care. They kept screaming every time I broke a finger, every toenail I ripped off, and then broke it.

However, he yelled like a selfish person and didn't care about me or the environment at all.

“Haa… Why can’t people listen to me nicely?” I lamented at how good-natured I was. Even after all of that, I only asked him nicely to quiet down a bit.

“Wh-what do you want? Just te-tell me!!” The man yelled once the pain of losing all his fingers had gone away.

“Oh, I forgot about that part.” I said like a klutz and said, “Sorry. I didn't bother asking again because I assumed you were the loyal kind when you initially refused."

I really did forget.

Anyway…

“Tell me about what you were doing back there in the sewers. And what are the queen’s orders?” I asked the simplest questions in my mind.

“Th-that…” He didn’t go beyond that point. See, that was exactly what I was talking about. What was there to even think about? His life was at stake here.

Grab…

Twist…

“AAAAHHHH!!!!”

He screamed even louder than before. Well, made sense. I broke a bigger bone after all. His elbow.

Once again, he screamed for a long time before he stopped. After approximately ten minutes, during which I maintained my composure, he stated, "Sh-she desired the dragon flowers."

I believed that he was referring to the blue lilies when he mentioned dragon flowers. I took a deep breath and asked, “What for?”

“To-to cure herself.” He stuttered. In pain.

“Cure herself of what?” I asked.

“Her illness.” He replied.

“What is her illness?” I shot back.

“I do not know.” Her replied. I would have hoped he was telling the truth based on his condition. But…

Snap!!!

“GAAAAHHHH!!!!”

The yelling continued for a long time before he finally stopped, only this time after over ten minutes. He finished, took a few deep breaths like he had just finished a marathon, and then he said, "She bleeds from her vagina."

Talk about being vague.

Despite my lack of medical expertise, I was aware that there were at least tens of potential causes for vaginal bleeding. The most common one was during the period. Given that Zara had periods, it was conceivable, but it could also be something else entirely.

For instance, a tumor, changes in hormones, or taking different kinds of medicines. A full checkup would be needed to figure out which one it was.

For now, I needed to finish up with this guy.

“What are you here for? Before you answer, I want to know if you said anything about the magical plants. I'm going to break your legs.” I asked, but made it clear before I gave him the go-ahead to answer.

“Haa… Haa…” After staring at him for a moment, I was about to go for his knees when he quickly replied, "The core! The core! We are here for the core.”

“What core?” I stopped and asked.

“The core of the mutated monster. Those ignorant conservatives made something. We do not know what it is, but we do know that it has a magical core that can help make more of them." He spoke in a way I didn’t understand one bit.

“Okay, now you may think that I understood everything, but I didn’t understand any of it. So…” Sitting cross-legged in front of him, I gave him half of a potion so he wouldn't heal all the way, and asked, "Why don't we start this from the beginning?"

~~

“Where is your squire, my lord?” While we were standing in the fields, Zara asked quietly, and Redford was standing there, his nervousness clearly visible. Naturally, Zara knew he was nervous, but she didn't know why.

“I have… sent him back with my research data.” Redford stammered nervously. Being as perceptive as a hawk, Zara knew exactly where to hit the mark right away because even a fool could tell something had happened.

“Is that so? I really hope that the king can answer soon." Zara said.

Nothing more was accomplished that day, so we all went back to our homes. When Zara came inside, I walked up behind her because I was itching for some alone time with her, something I hadn't done in a few days.

We had her servant with us, but she shouldn't have known that what I was about to do to her master was wrong, would she?

“Hmm?” When Zara sensed my hand on her ass, she stopped in her tracks. The past few days had been busy for everyone, including her and me. There was no time to do anything naughty. Not even to grope anyone like this.

“What are you doing, Jack?” She asked. It didn't bother her at all that I was touching her.

“I was going to inspect this, Lady Zara,” I replied, and then slid my hand down a bit, still above her clothes. I traced her asshole, and to my surprise, the buttplug was still there.

“Have you not taken it out yet, Lady Zara?” I asked.

“Don’t be ridiculous. Of course, I do when I have to relieve myself.” Zara answered and walked steadily, just fast enough so that my hand would stay on her ass while she walked.

“And then you put it back in?” I asked.

“Yes. It feels good, after all.” She replied, but after a brief moment of hesitation, she nodded. "However, it does not produce the same level of enjoyment as it did previously, as it is no longer humming."

Did she mean vibrate?

After all, she was struggling to put the pieces together.

I just smiled and asked, "Would you like it to vibrate again?"

“Vibrate?” She asked.

“Yes. Humming.” I replied.

“Hmm. So that’s what it was.” It was like something clicked in her head, and she said, "If you can. It feels amazing after all.”

I did not wait for us to arrive at the room; instead, I asked her, "Could you please place your hands on the wall and press your butt out?"

She followed my instructions exactly and asked me no questions at all. She put her hands on the wall, stooped a little, and pushed her ass out so I could do my thing.

I lifted her dress to show off her ass without panties. There was no underwear in this world, so I didn't bother introducing any. Although I had yet to introduce one product to the women, I was planning to do so as soon as Redford departed.

Even though I could see half of the buttplug, I used my hands to spread her ass apart. Once in proper view, I applied [Cleanse] to her asshole and then the buttplug since I could only do it for one thing at a time.

Once done, I slowly began to pull the buttplug out.

"Un~!" She let out a little grunt, accompanied by a moan, but that was the only sound she made until I had completely removed the buttplug.

“Haa… Haa…” For a brief moment, she gasped, and I saw her ass tremble, clench, and flinch before gradually reverting to its tight form. Soon enough, the tight asshole was back to how it was before, just making me want to play with her.

Even so, I chose to concentrate on the current task before she had to remind me.

I put the mana crystal in the buttplug against another mana crystal in my inventory to charge it right away. When the mana crystal in my hand lost its color, it indicated that the device had been charged.

It started to vibrate once more after I slightly shifted the top.

Now, all I had to do was put it where it belonged.

“I’m putting it back in, Lady Zara,” I warned.

“Mhm.” In response, Zara nearly whimpered but remained silent.

I positioned the metallic plug at Zara's asshole, gently pushing it in while it vibrated. This action stimulated her anal veins and helped to open up her tight asshole.

It was amazing to see something so large fit into something so small and tight, but it was even more amazing to watch her tiny, tight ass give way to the buttplug, opening as though it had its own will and not resisting at all.

Eventually, I completed the insertion process within a minute, and Zara was panting profusely, her head lowered significantly.

Smiling with satisfaction, I immediately slapped her ass and watched the ripple effect.

“Hnng~!”

But other than a moan, no other protest came.

“S-so, are you done?” Zara asked with a small stutter.

“Yes, Lady Zara,” I replied.

“Very well.” After saying that, she straightened her dress and started to walk again, albeit more slowly now that she had a vibrating metal object in her ass.

~~

I hope there are no mistakes.

One hundred chapters done. Hopefully will reach 400k views by tomorrow.

Should I stop uploading now?

Haha, just kidding.

If you liked my work, then please leave a review and support me in any way you can.
